title: Piquant Silky Portuguese Chicken Skillet
description: This malty and silky Portuguese dish features fajita seasoning and is anti-inflammatory friendly, making it a great option for a weeknight dinner. The combination of chicken, vegetables, and spices creates a flavorful and healthy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, fajita seasoning, turmeric, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 10 minutes.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
